title: mikania corei
intro: Mikania corei, also known as Core's Bee Balm or Core's Mikania, is a perennial plant native to Mexico, belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mikania corei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Mikania corei can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable natural remedy in traditional medicine.
